pages.text: Time Period: Late Devonian-Late Carboniferous Period $(br2)Temperament: Passive $(br2)Diet: Carnivorous $(br2)Preferred Habitats: Lukewarm Oceans, Reefs
The Stethacanthus is a small, neutral shark that will swim away from players that get too close. They will hunt most aquatic prey smaller than them, including Jawless Fish.
